full_text:
Yue Zhao 樂肇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yue Zhao (樂肇). Yue Shen’s son. Yue Jin’s grandson. Inherited his father’s position. Yue Zhao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
